title: selaginella subcalcarata
intro: Selaginella subcalcarata, also known as the dwarf spike moss or spike moss, is a small, terrestrial plant belonging to the genus Selaginella, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella subcalcarata are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
